comment: Run language-appropriate linters before any 'git commit' Bash invocation. Blocks the commit if lint fails. Fails CLOSED if python3 is missing or CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT cannot be parsed — better to block a commit than silently skip lint. Install by merging the 'hooks.PreToolUse' array into ~/.claude/settings.json (or the project-level .claude/settings.json).

hooks.comment: Detect a 'git commit' invocation; run Go and/or Java lint depending on what's in the repo. Parses CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT with python3 (universally available) rather than jq.
hooks.command: command -v python3 >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo 'pre-commit-lint hook: python3 not found; failing closed' >&2; exit 2; }; cmd=$(printf '%s' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c 'import sys,json;d=json.load(sys.stdin);print(d.get("command",""))' 2>/dev/null) || { echo 'pre-commit-lint hook: failed to parse CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT; failing closed' >&2; exit 2; }; [ -n "$cmd" ] || { echo 'pre-commit-lint hook: empty .command; failing closed' >&2; exit 2; }; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\bgit\s+commit\b'; then echo 'Pre-commit lint…' >&2; if [ -f go.mod ]; then gofmt -l . | tee /dev/stderr | (! grep .) || { echo 'gofmt found unformatted files; run: gofmt -w .' >&2; exit 2; }; go vet ./... || exit 2; fi; if [ -f pom.xml ]; then mvn -B spotless:check || { echo 'spotless found unformatted files; run: mvn spotless:apply' >&2; exit 2; }; fi; fi; exit 0
